_comment: Last-resort jokes used only when JokeAPI and icanhazdadjoke are both unreachable. Must be safe for live broadcast — clean, inoffensive, evergreen.
items: I told my computer I needed a break, and it said: 'No problem — I'll go to sleep.'
Why did the radio DJ bring a ladder to the studio? Because he wanted to reach the high notes.
I used to play piano by ear. Now I use my hands.
I asked the librarian for books on paranoia. She whispered, 'They're right behind you.'
Parallel lines have so much in common. It's a shame they'll never meet.
I'd tell you a joke about pizza, but it's a little cheesy.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.
I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta.
I tried to catch fog yesterday. Mist.
